weapons.name: Unarmed
weapons.notes: Unarmed and light weapons can be used as finesse weapons.

weapons.name: Light Weapon
weapons.examples: Knife, small melee weapon, pistol (10 uses before reload)
weapons.notes: Can be used as finesse weapon.

weapons.name: Medium Weapon
weapons.examples: SMG (medium range, 10 bursts before reload), large melee weapon (sword, axe)

weapons.name: Heavy Weapon
weapons.examples: Assault rifle (long range, 6 bursts, slow reload — 1 round), two-handed melee weapon
weapons.notes: Firearms: disadvantage when targeting foes at melee range.

armor.name: Light Armor
armor.description: Stealthy — can look like regular clothes. AC = 10 + DEX + 2.

armor.name: Medium Armor
armor.description: Less stealthy — noticeable with a perception check. AC = 10 + DEX + 4.

armor.name: Heavy Armor
armor.description: AC = 20 flat (DEX modifier not applied). Cannot be hidden.
